emails.subject: RE: BNP Paribas Master Netting Agreement
emails.body: RE: BNP Paribas Master Netting Agreement Here is a more current draft of the agreement. Thanks for your assistance. Harlan E. Murphy Enron Wholesale Services Legal 1400 Smith Street, EB 3811 Houston, Texas 77002 Tel: 713.345.2679 Fax: 713.646.3490 E-mail: Harlan.Murphy@Enron.com

emails.subject: BNP Paribas Master Netting Agreement
emails.body: BNP Paribas Master Netting Agreement Here is the current draft of the Paribas Master Netting Agreement. We intend to execute this this morning. The entities and agreements may change prior to execution. Contact me with any questions. Harlan E. Murphy Enron Wholesale Services Legal 1400 Smith Street, EB 3811 Houston, Texas 77002 Tel: 713.345.2679 Fax: 713.646.3490 E-mail: Harlan.Murphy@Enron.com

emails.subject: RE: BNP Paribas Master Netting Agreement
emails.body: RE: BNP Paribas Master Netting Agreement Harlan: Here are a clean and blacklined copy of the mna with the revised Exhibit A. The second one is the blackline copy. Marie To: Heard, Marie; Ephross, Joel; Cash, Trey; Gray, Barbara N.; Winn, Melinda; Clark, Morris
